name: The Open Data Index
description: A curated directory of open/public data APIs for prototyping.

sources.name: The Met Collection
sources.description: 490k+ open-access artworks with high-res public-domain images, departments & search.

sources.name: Art Institute of Chicago
sources.description: 120k+ works with IIIF images, colors, and rich tombstone metadata.

sources.name: Rijksmuseum
sources.description: 700k+ objects — Rembrandt, Vermeer & the Dutch masters, with images.

sources.name: Harvard Art Museums
sources.description: 250k objects across three museums, deep metadata and color analysis.

sources.name: Cleveland Museum of Art
sources.description: 60k+ works, mostly CC0 open access with downloadable images.

sources.name: Smithsonian Open Access
sources.description: 3M+ CC0 images & records spanning all Smithsonian museums and archives.

sources.name: Cooper Hewitt
sources.description: Smithsonian's design museum — objects, people, and color-tagged records.

sources.name: Europeana
sources.description: 50M+ cultural-heritage items from museums & libraries across Europe.

sources.name: Wikidata (SPARQL)
sources.description: Query the structured knowledge graph behind Wikipedia — people, places, works.

sources.name: NASA APIs
sources.description: APOD, Mars rover photos, EPIC Earth imagery, near-Earth objects. DEMO_KEY works.

sources.name: ISS Now (Open Notify)
sources.description: Live latitude/longitude of the International Space Station, updated by the second.

sources.name: Launch Library 2
sources.description: Every rocket launch, past and upcoming, across all space agencies and companies.

sources.name: arXiv
sources.description: Open API over millions of physics, math, CS & bio preprints.

sources.name: OpenAlex
sources.description: 250M+ scholarly works, authors, institutions & citations — fully open.

sources.name: USGS Earthquakes
sources.description: Real-time global earthquake feed as GeoJSON, filterable by magnitude & time.

sources.name: Open-Meteo
sources.description: Free global weather — forecast, historical, marine & air quality. No key, ever.

sources.name: NWS Weather (NOAA)
sources.description: Official U.S. forecasts, alerts & observations straight from the National Weather Service.

sources.name: PubChem
sources.description: Chemical compounds, structures & properties from the NIH chemistry database.

sources.name: NYC Open Data — 311
sources.description: The famous one: every NYC 311 service request, including noise complaints.

sources.name: Socrata Discovery
sources.description: One catalog across hundreds of city & state portals (Chicago, SF, LA…).

sources.name: Data.gov
sources.description: The U.S. federal catalog — 250k+ datasets, many with live API endpoints.

sources.name: U.S. Census Bureau
sources.description: Population, demographics & economic data down to the census tract.

sources.name: OpenFEC
sources.description: U.S. campaign finance — candidates, committees, donations & spending.

sources.name: Congress.gov API
sources.description: Bills, members, votes & the Congressional Record from the Library of Congress.

sources.name: UK Police Data
sources.description: Street-level crime, outcomes & stop-and-search across England & Wales.

sources.name: data.europa.eu
sources.description: The EU's official open-data portal — 1.7M+ datasets from member states.

sources.name: Open States
sources.description: Bills, legislators & votes across all 50 U.S. state legislatures.

sources.name: Overpass (OpenStreetMap)
sources.description: Query the entire world map — every cafe, bench, trail or building, by tag.

sources.name: Nominatim
sources.description: Forward & reverse geocoding backed by the full OSM dataset. Mind the rate limit.

sources.name: REST Countries
sources.description: Flags, currencies, languages, borders & population for every country.

sources.name: GeoNames
sources.description: 11M+ place names worldwide — cities, postal codes, timezones, elevation.

sources.name: Open-Elevation
sources.description: Elevation in meters for any latitude/longitude, single or batched.

sources.name: OpenRouteService
sources.description: Directions, isochrones, matrices & geocoding on open map data.

sources.name: ipapi
sources.description: Geolocate any IP address — city, region, coordinates, timezone & ISP.

sources.name: GBIF
sources.description: 2B+ species occurrence records — the backbone of global biodiversity data.

sources.name: iNaturalist
sources.description: Millions of crowd-sourced, photo-backed wildlife observations worldwide.

sources.name: eBird (Cornell)
sources.description: Bird sightings, hotspots & recent observations from the world's birders.

sources.name: OpenAQ
sources.description: Open air-quality measurements (PM2.5, ozone…) aggregated globally.

sources.name: USGS Water Services
sources.description: Real-time U.S. streamflow, groundwater & water-quality from monitoring sites.

sources.name: NASA EONET
sources.description: Live natural events — wildfires, storms, volcanoes — as a geospatial feed.

sources.name: openFDA
sources.description: Drug labels, adverse events, recalls & device data from the U.S. FDA.

sources.name: disease.sh
sources.description: Tidy worldwide disease statistics (COVID, influenza, vaccines) by country.

sources.name: WHO GHO
sources.description: World Health Organization's Global Health Observatory indicators via OData.

sources.name: ClinicalTrials.gov
sources.description: 450k+ registered clinical studies, fully queryable in v2.

sources.name: Ensembl REST
sources.description: Genomics — genes, variants & sequences across hundreds of species.

sources.name: UniProt
sources.description: The reference database of protein sequences and functional annotation.

sources.name: RxNorm (NIH)
sources.description: Normalized U.S. drug names, ingredients & interaction lookups.

sources.name: World Bank Open Data
sources.description: Thousands of development indicators for every country, back to 1960.

sources.name: FRED (St. Louis Fed)
sources.description: 800k+ U.S. & global economic time series — rates, jobs, inflation.

sources.name: IMF DataMapper
sources.description: Macroeconomic indicators and outlook projections by the IMF.

sources.name: Frankfurter
sources.description: Free currency exchange rates from the ECB — current & historical, no key.

sources.name: CoinGecko
sources.description: Prices, market caps & history for 10k+ crypto coins. Generous free tier.

sources.name: Alpha Vantage
sources.description: Stock quotes, technical indicators & FX. Free key, ~25 calls/day.

sources.name: Open Library
sources.description: 20M+ book records with covers, editions, authors & subjects.

sources.name: Gutendex
sources.description: Clean JSON over Project Gutenberg's 70k+ free public-domain ebooks.

sources.name: Google Books
sources.description: Search volumes worldwide with previews, ratings & metadata.

sources.name: Datamuse
sources.description: Word-finding engine — rhymes, synonyms, associations & autocomplete.

sources.name: Free Dictionary
sources.description: Definitions, phonetics, examples & synonyms for English words.

sources.name: PoetryDB
sources.description: Search thousands of public-domain poems by author, title or line.

sources.name: TheMealDB
sources.description: Recipes with ingredients, images & instructions, searchable by category.

sources.name: TheCocktailDB
sources.description: Cocktail recipes, ingredients & glassware — a classic prototyping favorite.

sources.name: Open Food Facts
sources.description: 3M+ crowd-sourced products with nutrition, ingredients, labels & images.

sources.name: USDA FoodData Central
sources.description: Authoritative U.S. nutrition data for hundreds of thousands of foods.

sources.name: Open Brewery DB
sources.description: Breweries worldwide with type, location & contact info.

sources.name: MusicBrainz
sources.description: The open music encyclopedia — artists, releases, recordings & relationships.

sources.name: Cover Art Archive
sources.description: Album artwork linked to MusicBrainz releases, free to fetch.

sources.name: Last.fm
sources.description: Scrobble data, charts, similar artists & rich music metadata.

sources.name: Spotify Web API
sources.description: Catalog, audio features, playlists & recommendations.

sources.name: TMDB
sources.description: Movies & TV — posters, cast, ratings, trending. Excellent free tier.

sources.name: TVmaze
sources.description: TV show schedules, episodes & cast — no key for the public endpoints.

sources.name: OMDb
sources.description: Movie & series data by title or IMDb ID. Free key by email.

sources.name: Transitland
sources.description: Worldwide transit feeds (GTFS) — routes, stops & schedules in one API.

sources.name: OpenSky Network
sources.description: Live aircraft positions worldwide — track flights in real time.

sources.name: GBFS / Citi Bike
sources.description: Real-time bikeshare feeds — station status & free bikes, standardized worldwide.

sources.name: BART
sources.description: Bay Area Rapid Transit — real-time departures, routes & advisories.

sources.name: OpenFlights
sources.description: Open dataset of 10k+ airports, airlines & routes (CSV downloads).

sources.name: PokéAPI
sources.description: Every Pokémon, move, type & evolution — the gold-standard teaching API.

sources.name: SWAPI
sources.description: Star Wars people, planets, ships & films. Use swapi.info as a stable mirror.

sources.name: Dog CEO
sources.description: Endless random dog photos by breed — instant demo material.

sources.name: The Cat API
sources.description: Cat images, breeds & filters; optional free key for more.

sources.name: Rick and Morty
sources.description: Characters, locations & episodes — clean REST + GraphQL.

sources.name: Open Trivia DB
sources.description: Free quiz questions across categories & difficulties — great for games.

sources.name: JSONPlaceholder
sources.description: Fake REST data (posts, users, todos) for wiring up UI prototypes fast.

sources.name: Numbers API
sources.description: A factoid for any number — math, trivia, dates. Tiny and delightful.

sources.name: Quotable
sources.description: Searchable quotations by author & tag for widgets and daily-quote apps.

sources.name: Unsplash
sources.description: High-quality free photography with search, collections & user data. Demo tier to start.

sources.name: Pexels
sources.description: Free stock photos and videos with a clean, generous API.

sources.name: Pixabay
sources.description: Photos, illustrations, vectors & video clips, all free to use.

sources.name: NASA Image & Video Library
sources.description: Hundreds of thousands of NASA photos, audio & video, fully searchable.

sources.name: Lorem Picsum
sources.description: Drop-in placeholder photos at any size — perfect for mockups.

sources.name: Flickr
sources.description: Billions of photos with rich tags, geodata, albums & EXIF.

sources.name: Wikimedia Commons
sources.description: 100M+ freely-licensed images, audio & video via the MediaWiki API.

sources.name: NASA GIBS
sources.description: 1,000+ full-resolution satellite imagery layers as map tiles, updated daily.

sources.name: MS Planetary Computer
sources.description: STAC catalog over petabytes of open Earth-observation data — Landsat, Sentinel & more.

sources.name: Copernicus Data Space
sources.description: Free access to all Sentinel missions — radar & multispectral imagery of Earth.

sources.name: NASA EPIC
sources.description: Daily full-disk images of the sunlit Earth from the DSCOVR satellite.

sources.name: NASA Earthdata CMR
sources.description: Search 9,000+ Earth-science datasets and their granules in one catalog.

sources.name: USGS EarthExplorer (M2M)
sources.description: Programmatic access to the full Landsat archive and aerial imagery.

sources.name: OpenAerialMap
sources.description: Open aerial & drone imagery from around the world, indexed as STAC.

sources.name: The Guardian
sources.description: Open Platform: full article text, tags & sections back to 1999. Free key.

sources.name: New York Times
sources.description: Article Search, Top Stories, Most Popular & Books lists. Free key.

sources.name: GDELT 2.0
sources.description: Global news events, themes & tone from worldwide coverage, refreshed every 15 min.

sources.name: Hacker News
sources.description: Stories, comments & users from HN via a simple Firebase API.

sources.name: Spaceflight News
sources.description: Articles, blogs & reports about spaceflight, aggregated and searchable.

sources.name: Chronicling America
sources.description: Digitized historic U.S. newspapers, 1770s–present, from the Library of Congress.

sources.name: NewsAPI
sources.description: Headlines & articles from 150k+ sources worldwide. Free developer tier.

sources.name: LibreTranslate
sources.description: Open-source machine translation you can self-host or hit on a hosted instance.

sources.name: MyMemory
sources.description: World's largest translation memory — 1,000+ language pairs, no key for light use.

sources.name: DeepL API Free
sources.description: High-quality neural translation; free tier covers 500k characters/month.

sources.name: Apertium
sources.description: Open-source rule-based translation, strong on lesser-resourced language pairs.

sources.name: Wiktionary
sources.description: Definitions, etymologies & translations across languages via the MediaWiki API.

sources.name: Tatoeba
sources.description: Millions of example sentences with translations, searchable by language.

sources.name: TheSportsDB
sources.description: Teams, players, events, logos & scores across dozens of sports. Free test key.

sources.name: balldontlie
sources.description: NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL & soccer stats, games & standings. Free key — Knicks included.

sources.name: Football-Data.org
sources.description: Soccer competitions, fixtures, standings & scorers. Generous free tier.

sources.name: MLB Stats API
sources.description: Official MLB data — schedules, live games, players & deep stats.

sources.name: NHL API
sources.description: Schedules, scores, standings & player stats for the NHL.

sources.name: ESPN (unofficial)
sources.description: Undocumented JSON endpoints for live scores & standings across leagues.

sources.name: Jolpica-F1
sources.description: Formula 1 results, schedules & standings — the successor to the Ergast API.

sources.name: GitHub REST API
sources.description: Repos, issues, commits, users & stars. Higher limits with a free token.

sources.name: npm Registry
sources.description: Package metadata, versions & download counts for the JS ecosystem.

sources.name: PyPI
sources.description: JSON metadata for any Python package — versions, releases, dependencies.

sources.name: crates.io
sources.description: Metadata, versions & download stats for the Rust crate ecosystem.

sources.name: Stack Exchange
sources.description: Questions, answers & users across Stack Overflow and 170+ sites.

sources.name: Libraries.io
sources.description: Open-source packages across 30+ registries, with dependency graphs.

sources.name: Have I Been Pwned
sources.description: Check passwords against breaches via the keyless k-anonymity range API.

sources.name: RAWG
sources.description: 500k+ video games with ratings, screenshots, platforms & stores. Free key.

sources.name: Scryfall
sources.description: Every Magic: The Gathering card with images, prices & rich search syntax.

sources.name: Deck of Cards
sources.description: Shuffle and draw from virtual card decks — a hackathon classic.

sources.name: Chess.com
sources.description: Public player profiles, game archives, stats & leaderboards.

sources.name: Lichess
sources.description: Games, puzzles, tournaments & the opening explorer from the open chess site.

sources.name: IGDB
sources.description: Vast game database — covers, genres, release dates & companies (Twitch auth).

sources.name: FreeToGame
sources.description: Catalog of free-to-play PC & browser games with details and tags.
